meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Fundraisly
products.tagline: AI fundraising agent that finds investors and books meetings
products.summaryZh: AI融资代理，可寻找投资者并安排会议
products.descriptionZh: Fundraisly：终极AI募资代理。它分析30万+投资者及数百万笔交易，识别活跃投资于你所在领域的相关方，从你的人脉网络中绘制通往他们的温暖路径，再通过精准的冷启动覆盖其余部分。结果：20-40场合格投资者会议。由累计募资超10亿美元的创始人团队打造。
products.description: Fundraisly: ultimate AI agent for fundraising. It analyzes 300K+ investors and millions of deals, identifies the relevant ones actively investing in your space, maps warm paths to them from your own network, then covers the rest with targeted cold outreach. The result: 20-40 qualified investor meetings. Built by founders who raised over $1B.

products.name: Vokal
products.tagline: A collaboration space for 10x teammates with their Al agents
products.summaryZh: 面向10倍效率团队成员及其AI助手的协作空间
products.descriptionZh: 你的Codex和我的Codex无法直接对话，于是我们在Slack里玩起了人工传话游戏：复制提示词、粘贴摘要、请求审阅，最终却丢失了上下文。Vokal能在数分钟内将10倍效率的队友及其智能体整合到一个实时工作空间——无论他们运行的是本地Codex、Claude Code、Hermes，还是云端方案。为你的智能体命名，赋予角色、权限和记忆，工作将在共享协作空间中展开，而非通过复制粘贴的交接流程。
products.description: Your Codex and my Codex can’t talk, so we play human telephone in Slack: copy prompts, paste summaries, ask for reviews, and lose the run. Vokal brings 10x teammates and their agents into one live workspace in minutes, whether they run local Codex, Claude Code, or Hermes — or in the cloud. Name your agents, give them roles, access, and memory, and work will happen in a shared collaboration space instead of through copy-paste handoffs.

products.name: Gigacatalyst
products.tagline: Give your Sales and CS teams engineering superpowers
products.summaryZh: 赋予销售和客户成功团队工程级的超能力
products.descriptionZh: Gigacatalyst.com的AI构建器可学习您的API并嵌入您的产品中，使您的销售和客户成功团队能够将客户所需但缺失的功能直接添加到您的平台。当您的软件适应每位客户的工作流程时，客户会更多地使用您的软件、留存更久、扩展更快，因为他们能获得最贴合自身使用场景的定制化实现。
products.description: Gigacatalyst.com's AI builder learns your APIs and embeds in your product, so your sales and CS teams can build missing features that customers need to your platform. When your software adapts to every customer's workflow, they utilize your software more, retain for longer, and expand quicker, because they get most custom implementation for their exact usecase.

products.name: Brief
products.tagline: Navigate your agents to product-market fit
products.summaryZh: 引导您的智能体实现产品市场契合
products.descriptionZh: AI代理可以快速交付，但缺乏正确的产品上下文时，它们往往如同盲飞。Brief为产品团队提供了一个动态的真实来源，能够捕捉决策、保留产品意图，并通过聊天、Slack、CLI和MCP向人类和代理提供相关上下文。它从愿景到影响，始终将战略、决策和执行紧密相连。
products.description: AI agents can ship quickly, but without the right product context, they're often flying blind. Brief gives product teams a living source of truth that captures decisions, preserves product intent, and serves relevant context to humans and agents through chat, Slack, CLI, and MCP. It keeps strategy, decisions, and execution connected from vision to impact.

products.name: Paste MCP & AI Tools
products.tagline: Infinite clipboard for Claude, Codex and other AI tools
products.summaryZh: Claude、Codex及其他AI工具的无限剪贴板
products.descriptionZh: 隐私优先、闪电般快速、可搜索，并支持所有设备。保存片段，安全同步，通过智能快捷键和即时粘贴历史提升效率。
products.description: Privacy-first, lightning fast, searchable, and avaialbe across all devices. Save snippets, sync securely, and boost productivity with smart shortcuts and instant paste history.

products.name: PawPause
products.tagline: Lock your keyboard and prevent cats from causing chaos
products.summaryZh: 锁定键盘，防止猫咪捣乱
products.descriptionZh: 一款小巧的macOS菜单栏应用，能检测猫咪是否踩在键盘上，并在系统范围内暂停输入。完全在设备本地运行。开源。免费。
products.description: A tiny macOS menu bar app that detects when your cat is on the keyboard and pauses input system-wide. 100% on-device. Open source. Free.

products.name: Enshittifier
products.tagline: Chrome extension that replaces "AI" with 💩
products.summaryZh: 将“AI”替换为💩的Chrome扩展
products.descriptionZh: Mac 应用的起点是一个无厘头的问题：能不能用字体连字把 AI 变成 💩？结果发现可以。讽刺的是，我靠 AI 才搞明白怎么做。Chrome 扩展是后来加的——网页字体总是不太配合。所以这主要是我的调侃，也是一个小小的提醒：对 AI 的喧嚣稍微多留点心。而这一切，显然要从你的字体文件开始。
products.description: The Mac app started as a dumb question: can you use font ligatures to turn AI into 💩? Turns out yes. Ironically, I used AI to figure out how. The Chrome extension came after — web fonts don't always cooperate. So mostly this is me poking fun. It's also a small nudge to be a little more mindful of the din around AI. Starting, apparently, with your font files.

products.name: Rodeo by TwelveLabs
products.tagline: Describe your shot. Rodeo builds your first cut.
products.summaryZh: 描述你的镜头。Rodeo 构建你的初剪。
products.descriptionZh: Rodeo by TwelveLabs 是一款面向规模化内容创作者与团队的AI视频智能平台。无需再耗费数小时逐帧浏览素材，只需使用自然语言，即可在数分钟内将原始片段转化为初版剪辑。这是结构化创作，而非人工审阅。与以文本转录为先的工具不同，Rodeo的多模态AI能同步理解视觉、音频、语音与文字，尤其适合以视觉为核心的内容。你的视频库如今可被人类与智能体即时检索。
products.description: Rodeo by TwelveLabs is the AI video intelligence platform for creators and teams who produce at scale. Stop wasting hours scrubbing footage. Go from raw clips to a first cut in minutes using plain language. It's structured creation, not manual review. Unlike transcript-first tools, Rodeo's multimodal AI understands visuals, audio, speech, and text simultaneously, making it perfect for visual-first content. Your video library is now instantly queryable for humans and agents.

products.name: choclift
products.tagline: Use iPhone to open apps, Apple Shortcuts and websites on Mac
products.summaryZh: 使用iPhone在Mac上打开应用、Apple快捷指令和网站。
products.descriptionZh: 超越键盘、触控板和鼠标：choclift 是 Mac 的第三种交互界面。它将你的 iPhone 变成一块可自定义的巧克力条，让你能即时切换常用和最近使用的 Mac 应用，无需绕路即可触发 Apple 快捷指令，并以全新方式使用网站书签。我们专注于产品设计与用户体验，刚刚开始打造与 Mac 协作的最快捷、最甜美的途径。
products.description: Think beyond the keyboard, trackpad, and mouse: choclift is the third interface for interacting with your Mac. It turns your iPhone into a customizable chocolate bar that lets you instantly switch between favorite and recent Mac apps, trigger Apple Shortcuts without any detours, and use website bookmarks like never before. With a strong focus on product design and user experience, we're just getting started on building the quickest and sweetest way to work with your Mac.

products.name: Branda
products.tagline: A fun new way to create & manage brands.
products.summaryZh: 创建与管理品牌的全新趣味方式。
products.descriptionZh: Branda 可在数分钟内将名称与创意转化为完整的品牌形象：策略、标志、配色、字体及全套品牌套件。支持从零开始或导入现有素材。✨ 注册即赠 200 免费额度 ✨ 可交由 AI 助手 Lucky 主导，或自行把控策略、草图与矢量概念。通过视觉提示保持每次生成的一致性，提取元素、矢量化至 SVG、放大、导出并分享至公开展示页。
products.description: Branda turns a name and idea into a complete brand identity in minutes: strategy, logo, palette, type, and full brand kit. Start from scratch or import existing assets. ✨ 200 free credits on signup ✨ Let AI lead with Lucky, or guide strategy, sketches, and vector concepts yourself. Use visual prompts to keep every generation consistent, extract elements, vectorize to SVG, upscale, export, and share a public showcase.

products.name: GlowPulse
products.tagline: Your Mac's camera is now a heart-rate sensor
products.summaryZh: 你的Mac摄像头现在可以当作心率传感器使用。
products.descriptionZh: GlowPulse 通过 Mac 内置摄像头，利用 rPPG 技术测量心率——无需手表、胸带或任何可穿戴设备。常驻菜单栏，显示实时 BPM、迷你折线图及颜色分区。完全在设备端运行。摄像头画面在内存中处理并立即丢弃。无云端、无账户、无遥测数据。支持番茄钟专注模式并配有实时心率图表。呼吸训练结合实时 HRV。30 秒压力检测。一次性付费 2.99 美元。需 macOS 13 及以上系统。
products.description: GlowPulse measures your heart rate from your Mac's built-in camera using rPPG – no watch, no chest strap, no wearable. Lives in the menu bar with live BPM, sparkline, and color-coded zones. 100% on-device. Camera frames are processed in memory and discarded. No cloud, no account, no telemetry. Pomodoro focus with live HR chart. Breathing sessions with real-time HRV. 30-second stress check. $2.99 once. macOS 13+.

products.name: Knock agent for Slack
products.tagline: Build, manage, and ship customer messaging from Slack
products.summaryZh: 在 Slack 中构建、管理并发送客户消息
products.descriptionZh: Knock 是一个以代理为主导的客户互动平台，用于管理用户在各渠道收到的所有消息。将 Knock 连接到 Slack 后，只需在任何频道中标记 @Knock，描述你的需求，代理便会在后台自动构建营销活动、起草消息内容并更新生命周期工作流。代理会从你的账户中获取上下文，在工作过程中在讨论串中发布进度更新，并在资源准备就绪可供审核时提供链接。
products.description: Knock is the agent-led customer engagement platform for managing all the messages your users receive across channels. After connecting Knock to Slack, simply tag @Knock in any channel, describe what you want, and let the agent work in the background to build campaigns, draft messaging, and update lifecycle workflows. The agent gathers the context from your account, posts progress updates in the thread as it works, and provides a link to the resource when it's ready to review.

products.name: Kompassify 2.0
products.tagline: User onboarding now with an AI copilot
products.summaryZh: 用户引导现已配备AI助手
products.descriptionZh: 我们打造Kompassify的初衷，是让团队无需接触代码即可引导用户上手。6年后，它已成长为完整的用户采纳平台，而这一切都源于你们的反馈：🗺️ 产品导览 ✅ 上手清单 🔔 通知组件 📋 应用内问卷 📊 产品分析 🤖 修复采纳问题的AI助手 👋 欢迎页面 🌍 多语言支持 ✂️ 用户分群。只需一段代码片段，无需编码。免费计划无需信用卡。🚀
products.description: We built Kompassify so teams could onboard users without touching code. 6 years later, it's grown into a full adoption platform shaped by your feedback: 🗺️ Product Tours ✅ Onboarding Checklists 🔔 Notifications Widget 📋 In-app Surveys 📊 Product Analytics 🤖 AI copilot to fix adoption 👋 Welcome Screens 🌍 Multi-language support ✂️ Segmentation One snippet. No-Coding required. Free plan no credit card required. 🚀

products.name: Moxie Docs
products.tagline: Living docs + MCP context for your GitHub repos
products.summaryZh: 实时文档 + MCP 上下文，适用于你的 GitHub 仓库
products.descriptionZh: Moxie Docs 对您的 GitHub 仓库进行一次索引，然后将理解结果置于工作发生之处：通过 MCP 将仓库上下文注入 AI 代理、一个可搜索的文档工作区，以及确保文档真实性的 PR 检查。
products.description: Moxie Docs indexes your GitHub repo once, then puts that understanding where the work happens: repo context inside your AI agents over MCP, a searchable docs workspace, and PR checks that keep documentation honest.

products.name: Mirowl
products.tagline: Search all your screenshots via a local OCR-powered AI
products.summaryZh: 通过本地OCR驱动的AI搜索所有截图
products.descriptionZh: 一款无感、本地优先的Mac应用，用于索引和搜索所有截图与图像资源。基于Rust/Tauri构建，零占用空间，并借助原生macOS Vision实现10倍OCR精度。可选云端功能，无追踪，纯粹实用。
products.description: A frictionless, local-first Mac app to index and search all your screenshots and image assets. Built with Rust/Tauri for zero footprint and powered by native macOS Vision for 10x OCR accuracy. Optional cloud, no tracking—just pure utility.

products.name: Galleroo
products.tagline: Turn your Google Drive into a stunning client gallery
products.summaryZh: 将你的 Google Drive 变成一个精美的客户作品集
products.descriptionZh: Galleroo 可在 60 秒内将任意 Google Drive 文件夹转换为美观且受密码保护的客户画廊。无需重新上传，客户无需注册账号，您的照片始终保留在 Drive 中。
products.description: Galleroo turns any Google Drive folder into a beautiful, password-protected client gallery in under 60 seconds. No re-uploading, no account needed for clients, and your photos never leave your Drive.

products.name: Overline
products.tagline: Real-time AI captions and translation for any browser video
products.summaryZh: 任何浏览器视频的实时AI字幕与翻译
products.descriptionZh: Overline 是一款 Chrome 扩展程序，可在任意浏览器视频上叠加实时 AI 字幕与即时翻译，无需字幕文件，也无需切换标签页。支持 YouTube、Netflix、Twitch、Zoom 或任意标签页。延迟低于一秒。翻译功能可选，按会话启用。不注入页面、不上传文件，纯实时音频流处理。
products.description: Overline is a Chrome extension that adds real-time AI captions and live translation on top of any browser video, no subtitles needed, no tab switching. Works on YouTube, Netflix, Twitch, Zoom, or any tab. Sub-second latency. Translation is optional and per-session. No page injection, no file uploads, pure live audio streaming.

products.name: Co-Invest
products.tagline: Trade 500+ markets directly from ChatGPT & Claude
products.summaryZh: 通过ChatGPT和Claude直接交易500多个市场
products.descriptionZh: Liquid 推出的 Co-Invest 让您可以在 ChatGPT 或 Claude 中研究并执行真实交易。覆盖加密货币、股票、外汇、大宗商品及预测市场等 500 多个市场，全天候可用。在聊天界面内完成资金存入，利用链上信号（钱包活动、持仓、资金费率、订单流）进行分析，并通过自然语言设置止损/目标价位执行交易。您的 AI 助手还能在完整上下文背景下处理客服支持。
products.description: Co-Invest by Liquid lets you research and place real trades inside ChatGPT or Claude. Access 500+ markets across crypto, equities, FX, commodities, and prediction markets—24/7. Fund in-chat, use on-chain signals (wallet activity, positioning, funding, order flow), and execute in plain language with stops/targets. Your AI also handles support with full context.

products.name: Trovelo
products.tagline: Plan and track your trips privately
products.summaryZh: 私密规划并追踪你的旅行。
products.descriptionZh: Trovelo 是一款适用于 iPhone 和 Mac 的私人旅行规划工具——无需账户、无需服务器、无需订阅。由一位游历 40 多个国家、对现有应用深感失望的独行旅行者开发。通过智能卡片逐日规划行程，自然输入文字后应用自动识别，支持双币种费用追踪、路线优化，并通过 iCloud 实现私密同步。Pro 版一次性付费 6.99 美元，永久使用。
products.description: Trovelo is a private trip planner for iPhone and Mac — no accounts, no servers, no subscription. Built by a solo traveler with 40+ countries of experience frustrated with every existing app. Plan day by day with smart cards, type naturally and the app figures it out, track expenses in dual currency, optimize your route, and sync privately via iCloud. One-time $6.99 Pro. Yours forever.

products.name: ConnectWizard
products.tagline: Unlock hidden App Store Connect analytics
products.summaryZh: 解锁隐藏的 App Store Connect 分析数据
products.descriptionZh: App Store Connect 仅展示苹果实际收集的 App 数据中的一小部分。ConnectWizard 解锁全部 100 多种报告类型——包括 App Store 数据以及来自用户的设备端数据。从预设统计指标开始使用，固定你关注的指标，或深入原始数据并创建自己的预设。如果你的 App 拥有较大用户基数，你还能获取详细的框架使用数据，例如 Live Activities 的使用时长，或哪些 Shortcuts 运行成功或失败。
products.description: App Store Connect only shows a fraction of the data Apple actually collects about your app. ConnectWizard unlocks all 100+ report types — both App Store data and on-device data from your users. Get started with pre-defined stats and pin the ones that matter to you, or dig into the raw data and build your own presets. If your app has a larger user base, you also get detailed framework usage data like how long Live Activities are used or which Shortcuts run or fail.
